title: Privacy Policy
intro: At WinFlowz, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our products and services.

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.intro: We collect minimal personal information, limited to:
items: Payment information (processed securely by third-party providers)
Authentication and session data required to access your account

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: We use trusted third-party services for:

updates.title: 7. Updates
updates.content: This policy may be updated periodically. Users will be notified of significant changes.
